challenge.title: Bridging the Gap: Accessible Literacy for Remote Learners
challenge.scenario: In a rural mountainous region with inconsistent internet connectivity, primary school teachers are struggling to maintain literacy progress for students who are physically isolated from the classroom for weeks at a time.
challenge.customer_persona: A pragmatic and deeply empathetic educator who values tangible, analog-digital hybrid solutions over high-tech software that requires reliable bandwidth.
challenge.customer_context: Elena needs a self-contained learning tool that functions entirely offline, fits into a backpack, and provides automated phonetic feedback to students without needing a live teacher connection, ultimately requiring the player to design a physical, interactive learning interface.
